# huggingface-papers
## When to Use
Use when the request is about Hugging Face Papers, paper pages, paper-to-model links, collections, or research discovery on the Hub.
## Do Not Use When
Do not use for generic arXiv API lookup or local thesis bibliography repair.
## Required Inputs
Paper title, arXiv id, Hub paper URL, collection, or desired related artifacts.
## Workflow
1. Resolve the paper page or identifier.
2. Inspect linked models, datasets, Spaces, and discussion.
3. Summarize useful artifacts and citations.
